title: 2 Pcs Artificial Garland 70.87inch(180cm) Artificial Eucalyptus Garland,Ivy Artificia,Hanging Plant, For Wedding, Party, Autumn Decorations, Dining Table, Staircase, Yard Decoration
features: Packaging details: Each package contains 2 artificial garlands approximately 70.87 inches (180cm) in length. Decorative artificial plants are densely arranged with two different eucalyptus leaves and white flowers, making them look more realistic and beautiful

Size and vibrant colors: This package includes 2 pieces of eucalyptus vine with a length of 6 feet/1.8 meters. The realistic eucalyptus garland blends various shades of light green, dark green, and gray green frosted leaves, injecting fresh green plants into your home, Make your home look fresher

Worry free and durable: Compared to plants, artificial hanging plants can maintain freshness throughout the year without the need for watering. Ivy Garland Artificial is carefully crafted to prevent leaves from falling off and maintain their beauty for a long time. You can easily place the leaf flower ring anywhere for decoration

Excellent decorative effect: Hanging a green wreath with eucalyptus leaves on the wall or using it for bouquet decoration can bring unique charm to your space. Decorative artificial plants are a worry free decoration that does not require watering or special care, but can continue to provide you with visual enjoyment

Wide application range: ivy garland artificial contains iron wire, which is very soft and elastic, and can be bent according to needs. Artificial hanging plants are perfect for wrapping wedding arches, wedding backgrounds, halloween garden decorations, dining tables, courtyards, fireplaces, and window sills as decorations
description: Product description Product parameters: Weight: Approximately 88g per piece Length: Approximately 70.87 inches/180cm Product Highlights: Carefully crafted: The materials used to make the artificial eucalyptus wreath are carefully selected and compared, perfectly replicating real eucalyptus leaves in terms of color and texture. The Spring Flower Ring is made by mixing two different shapes of eucalyptus leaves and white flower buds, creating a lively and warm atmosphere with ease Suitable for various scenarios: Eucalyptus wreaths are used for dining tables/mantle/center decorations, wedding flower arch decorations, bathroom and living room wall decorations. Whether you want to create a romantic atmosphere or add beauty to your life, this artificial floral wreath blends perfectly with green plant vines Low maintenance and exquisite craftsmanship: The imitation green flower wreath is durable and will not wither, fade or be easily damaged. No watering is needed, so the fake ivy wreath remains fresh and easy to wipe clean. Enjoy the lasting beauty of lifelike cloak garlands without worrying about sunlight, watering, pruning, or other maintenance Odorless: The material used to make artificial leaf garlands has undergone special treatment and will not emit a very pungent odor. However, due to long-term sealed transportation, it is normal to have a slight odor when receiving the leaf wreath. Simply place the leaf flower ring in a well ventilated environment for a period of time, and the odor will gradually disappear Applicable scenarios: Our artificial green flower garlands are perfect for weddings, parties, and home decor, winding on wooden tables and chairs to make your wedding look extraordinary, sweet, and romantic. Suitable for indoor and outdoor decoration such as gardens, courtyards, swings, balconies, bedrooms, wall hanging, birthdays, banquets, weddings, etc Safety Warning 1
